hero.headline: We don't just finish the job. We finish it right.
hero.subtext: Ocean General Contractors remodels kitchens, baths, and whole homes across San Jose. Owner-operated by Noe Guzman — so the guy who quotes the job is the guy who shows up to do it.

about.heading: A real contractor. Not a call center.
about.paragraph1: Most contractors hand you off to a project manager you'll meet once. Not here. Noe is on your job — planning it, building it, and answering your texts. People keep using the same word in their reviews: honest. That's the whole business.
about.paragraph2: Kitchens and baths are our bread and butter, but we build from the ground up too — additions, foundations, framing, roofing, the works. Clean job sites. Fair prices. Timelines we actually hit. And we show up after the project's done if you need us.

services.title: Kitchen Remodels
services.description: Full gut-and-rebuild or a smart refresh — cabinets, counters, islands, the layout that finally makes sense.
services.tags: Custom cabinets, Granite & quartz, Cabinet refacing, Islands

services.title: Bathroom Remodels
services.description: Spa-grade walk-in showers, tile work, vanities, and fixtures. Our most-reviewed work, for good reason.
services.tags: Tile & stone, Walk-in showers, Waterproofing, Fixtures

services.title: Whole-Home Renovations
services.description: Living rooms, family rooms, closets, top to bottom. We've turned tired floor plans into "luxury showcase" — their words.

services.title: Additions & New Builds
services.description: Home additions, accessory buildings, ground-up construction. Foundations poured, framed, and finished by one crew.

services.title: Flooring
services.description: Hardwood, luxury vinyl, tile, and repairs. "Feels like something out of a luxury showcase," said Sheila. We'll take it.

services.title: Exterior & Structural
services.description: Siding, fascia, roof repair, decks, patios, porches, concrete, and structural repairs. Left clean, finished on time.
services.tags: Siding & fascia, Roofing, Decks & patios, Concrete

reviews.quote: "I would like to give 10 stars." Fantastic job on our kitchen and family room. Noe, the owner, was directly involved — which was important to us — and communicated every step of the way.
reviews.name: P. Nacino
reviews.reply: The kitchen and living room remodels were fun projects. We hope you have more in store for us.

reviews.quote: They transformed our old spaces into something beautiful and functional. Did a wonderful job on the bathroom and the condo remodel — and great price.
reviews.name: Dr. Hyung Lee

reviews.quote: Noe took the time to explain what needed to be done, offered helpful suggestions, and got it right. Professional, punctual, and very skilled.
reviews.name: Conrad

reviews.quote: Noe is transparent in his approach, hardworking and fairly priced. Fixed a plumbing leak at a very good price, repaired window frames and roof tiles, replaced fixtures. Inside and out.
reviews.name: Satheesh G.

reviews.quote: "HIGHLY RECOMMEND." Honest, communicative, excellent service. Noe worked well with my senior parents and gave honest feedback. Even the prep work was thorough.
reviews.name: Jill Grande
reviews.reply: It was great to work with you and your parents. I hope everyone is enjoying their new space!

reviews.quote: Completely transformed our floors and elevated our home to another level — it truly feels like something out of a luxury showcase. The attention to detail and the patience Noe brings to his work is unmatched.
reviews.name: Sheila Raines

reviews.quote: Noe truly listened to our ideas, helped us choose the perfect materials, and offered thoughtful advice whenever we needed it. Transformed our family room into the space we imagined.
reviews.name: Gisela Nacino

reviews.quote: I've known this guy for over 10 years and he is an honest, hard-working guy. Does great kitchen and bathroom remodels, or builds from the ground up. You're in great hands.
reviews.name: Alex Leon

reviews.quote: Repaired and replaced fascia and siding on my home exterior. Pleasant and respectful, finished in the estimated time, left the area clean. The work looked great.
reviews.name: Raymond Lim

reviews.quote: Easy to work with even when there are plan changes. Used them for my residence and my rental — a very good contractor. Glad I chose them.
reviews.name: Efren Esposo

reviews.quote: Located in San Jose, so it was fast to book a consultation. Really easy to work with and very attentive to your needs. Excellent job on my bathroom.
reviews.name: Joshua Guzman

reviews.quote: Best of the best in San Jose. Wouldn't choose anyone else. I recommend them to all my friends and family, and they all appreciate the excellent work.
reviews.name: Raul Lozano

contactSection.heading: Let's build something you'll actually love.
contactSection.text: Tell us about your project and Noe will get back to you — usually same day. Kitchens, baths, additions, repairs, the whole house. San Jose and the South Bay.
